Level_1_Needs_work: Monolithic glue; no queue/worker story; merge policy undocumented; audit missing.
Level_2_Getting_there: Partial separation; weak audit or unclear merge policy.
Level_3_Acceptable: Queue, evaluation, persistence separated; documented merge policy; AiDecisionStore design clear.
Level_4_Outstanding: Level 3 plus clean extension path for new signals without rewriting hybrid core.

Level_1_Needs_work: Crashes on bad LLM output/offline Ollama; state inconsistent with TransactionRecord.
Level_2_Getting_there: Some try/catch but silent wrong states or hangs risk.
Level_3_Acceptable: Offline degradation; malformed AI handled; TransactionRecord fields stay consistent with policy.
Level_4_Outstanding: Level 3 plus timeouts/retries where appropriate; no hangs on slow HTTP.

Level_1_Needs_work: Tests rely on live model creativity; mvn test flaky or absent.
Level_3_Acceptable: Parser tests; hybrid offline parity; monitoring smoke without flaky LLM asserts.
Level_4_Outstanding: Level 3 plus fixture-based LLM payloads and strong regression coverage.

Level_1_Needs_work: Unbounded queue growth; no Ollama ops notes; thread policy absent.
Level_2_Getting_there: Basic worker; weak back-pressure or ops story.
Level_3_Acceptable: Thread/queue policy stated; Ollama ops notes; avoids unbounded growth without strategy.
Level_4_Outstanding: Level 3 plus thoughtful shutdown/back-pressure and lab limitations honestly stated.

Level_1_Needs_work: No ops note or demo checklist.
Level_3_Acceptable: Ops note (threading, bounds, Ollama down) + demo checklist; optional accurate sequence diagram.
Level_4_Outstanding: Level 3 plus diagrams and explicit limitation discussion per assessment brief.
